languages.text: "Я поглядел, как живет чернь на флагмане. Жалуются на голод, холод, усталость. Нам с бойцами не привыкать, но хотелось бы знать вот что: как будет обустроена наша жизнь?"
"I've seen how the common folk live here. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My people and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know how exactly are we going to be settled?"
languages.original_text: "Я поглядел, как живет чернь на флагмане. Жалуются на голод, холод, усталость. Нам с бойцами не привыкать, но хотелось бы знать вот что: как будет обустроена наша жизнь?"

traits.locale_text: "I've taken a look at how the common folk live. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My men and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know this: how exactly are we going to be settled?"
"I've seen how the common folk live here. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My people and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know how exactly are we going to be settled?"
"I see how the common folk live. Hunger, cold, fatigue. And you know what? I don't think my lads and I are set for lives as high-ranking officers. So is that what we can expect as well?"
"I've taken a look at how the common folk live. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My men and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know this: how exactly are we going to be settled?"
"I've seen how the common folk live here. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My people and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know how exactly are we going to be settled?"

languages.text: 「庶民の暮らしぶりを目の当たりにした。飢え、寒さ、疲労。そして、君たちにはわかるだろう。俺たちには、高官としての人生は向いていない。だから、俺たちにも同じことが待っているのかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "I see how the common folk live. Hunger, cold, fatigue. And you know what? I don't think my lads and I are set for lives as high-ranking officers. So is that what we can expect as well?"

languages.text: "Avamın burada nasıl yaşadığını gördüm. Açlık, soğuk ve yorgunluktan şikâyet ediyorlar. Halkım ve ben zorluklara alışkınız ama tam olarak nasıl yerleştirileceğimizi bilmek isterim."
languages.original_text: "I've seen how the common folk live here. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My people and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know how exactly are we going to be settled?"

traits.locale_text: "Avamın burada nasıl yaşadığını gördüm. Açlık, soğuk ve yorgunluktan şikâyet ediyorlar. Halkım ve ben zorluklara alışkınız ama tam olarak nasıl yerleştirileceğimizi bilmek isterim."

languages.text: “我见过这里普通民众的生活。他们饥寒交加、疲惫不堪。我和我的人倒是吃惯了苦，但我想知道，您到底打算怎么安顿我们？”
languages.original_text: "I've seen how the common folk live here. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My people and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know how exactly are we going to be settled?"

traits.locale_text: “我见过这里普通民众的生活。他们饥寒交加、疲惫不堪。我和我的人倒是吃惯了苦，但我想知道，您到底打算怎么安顿我们？”

languages.text: "Ich habe gesehen, wie die einfachen Leute hier leben. Sie klagen über Hunger, Kälte und Erschöpfung. Meine Leute und ich sind Strapazen gewohnt, aber wie genau sollen wir angesiedelt werden?"
languages.original_text: "I've seen how the common folk live here. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My people and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know how exactly are we going to be settled?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe gesehen, wie die einfachen Leute hier leben. Sie klagen über Hunger, Kälte und Erschöpfung. Meine Leute und ich sind Strapazen gewohnt, aber wie genau sollen wir angesiedelt werden?"

languages.text: « J'ai remarqué comment vivaient les gens du commun : dans le froid, la faim et la fatigue. Mon peuple a traversé de nombreuses épreuves, mais j'aimerais bien savoir ce que vous nous réservez. »
languages.original_text: "I've seen how the common folk live here. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My people and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know how exactly are we going to be settled?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai remarqué comment vivaient les gens du commun : dans le froid, la faim et la fatigue. Mon peuple a traversé de nombreuses épreuves, mais j'aimerais bien savoir ce que vous nous réservez. »

languages.text: «He visto cómo vive aquí el pueblo llano. Se queja de hambre, frío y cansancio. Los míos y yo estamos acostumbrados a las dificultades, pero me gustaría saber exactamente en qué condiciones vamos a vivir».
languages.original_text: "I've seen how the common folk live here. They complain of hunger, cold, and exhaustion. My people and I are used to hardship, but I'd like to know how exactly are we going to be settled?"

traits.locale_text: «He visto cómo vive aquí el pueblo llano. Se queja de hambre, frío y cansancio. Los míos y yo estamos acostumbrados a las dificultades, pero me gustaría saber exactamente en qué condiciones vamos a vivir».
